TRADE_CONFIG: ADBE Iron Condor -- Buy $220P / Sell $230P | Sell $255C / Buy $265C - Exp. 2026-04-24
MARKET_ENVIRONMENT: Price at $240.14. ADBE trading within a defined range after recent volatility. IV at ~0% supports premium collection. Gamma walls at $235 (put) and $250 (call) define dealer-enforced boundaries with 16 DTE.
THESIS_POINTS:
• Range-bound setup between gamma walls at $235 and $250
  • Elevated OI concentration at key strikes confirms dealer positioning
  • 16 DTE provides meaningful theta decay with manageable gamma risk
  • Defined-risk structure caps max loss at $642 per contract
RATIONALE_POINTS:
• Short put at $230 positioned inside put wall ($235) for dealer support
  • Short call at $255 positioned above call wall ($250) for resistance
  • ~57% estimated win rate based on strike positioning
  • Gamma walls at $235 / $250 create dealer-enforced boundaries
  • Defined-risk structure -- max loss capped at $642/contract
GAMMA_WALL_EXPLANATION: Gamma walls are strike prices with exceptionally high open interest where dealers must hedge continuously. For ADBE, the put wall at $235 (OI=326) creates mechanical buying support, while the call wall at $250 (OI=277) creates selling resistance. Our iron condor profits from price staying within this dealer-enforced range.
GAMMA_ALIGNMENT_POINTS:
• Short Put ($230): Positioned $2.1% inside Put Wall ($235) -- benefits from dealer buying support
  • Short Call ($255): Positioned $2.0% outside Call Wall ($250) -- benefits from dealer selling pressure
  • Current Price ($240.14): Near the midpoint of the gamma band -- balanced exposure
  • Band Width $15 (6.2%): Short strikes are $10pts / $15pts from current price
THETA_EXPLANATION: Position benefits from time decay. Each calendar day that passes adds approximately $22.41 to position value. With 16 DTE, theta accelerates significantly in the final 5 trading days before expiration.
VEGA_EXPLANATION: Position has negative vega -- it benefits when implied volatility contracts. With IV currently at ~0%, any mean-reversion toward lower levels would add value to the position.
EVENT_RISK_ROWS: April 15Tax DayLOWMinor market impact expectedApril 16Fed Speaker EventsMEDIUMWatch for hawkish/dovish tone shiftApril 24Option ExpirationPLANNEDPosition closes -- collect max profit if within rangeVariesADBE Earnings / Tech sector newsMONITORCheck earnings date -- avoid holding through earnings
EXIT_PROFIT_TRIGGER: Position reaches 50% of max profit ($1.79 credit remaining)
EXIT_PROFIT_DETAIL: Close entire spread when position value drops to $1.79 debit. This captures 50% of max profit with days remaining, avoiding gamma risk near expiration. Use a GTC limit order to automate.
EXIT_STOP_TRIGGER: Position loses 100% of credit received (position worth $7.17 debit)
EXIT_STOP_DETAIL: Close entire spread if total position cost reaches $7.17 debit (2x credit). This limits actual loss to ~$358 on top of the $358 credit -- total capital at risk is reduced. Do not hold through max loss hoping for recovery.
EXIT_TIME_TRIGGER: 2 days before expiration (April 22) regardless of P&L
EXIT_TIME_DETAIL: Close position by April 22 to avoid pin risk at expiration. Gamma risk increases exponentially in final 48 hours -- small price moves can cause large P&L swings. Accept any remaining premium as profit.
EXIT_ADJUST_TRIGGER: Price approaches either short strike within $2.50
EXIT_ADJUST_DETAIL: If ADBE approaches $232 (put side) or $252 (call side), consider rolling the threatened spread further OTM. Only roll if you can collect additional credit. If adjustment would require a debit, prefer closing instead.

SCORE_INTERPRETATION: This trade scores 62/100 -- meets the 60+ recommended threshold. The system rates this as a moderate conviction setup based on gamma wall positioning and premium available.
SCORE_FACTORS:
• Score based on: Gamma wall analysis, OI concentration, IV levels, and strike positioning
  • Positive factors: clear gamma walls, adequate premium (3.58 credit), defined-risk structure
  • Drag factors: no pipeline technical data available, market closed for live delta confirmation
  • Recommendation: Enter with 1 contract; scale if confirmed by next session price action
